summary: Rare performance featuring High Time into China Doll back‑to‑back, but recording source and quality are unknown.
review: The sole review highlights the unusual back‑to‑back appearance of "High Time" followed by "China Doll," a sequence seen only five times in Dead history. No information is provided about the audio source or fidelity, so listeners cannot gauge the recording quality. Aside from noting the rarity, the reviewer offers no strong praise or criticism of the musical execution.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it points out a notable setlist moment (positive) but gives no insight into recording quality, leading to moderate confidence and an average‑to‑good rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not mention soundboard vs. audience source, clarity, or any technical issues; recording quality cannot be assessed from the available comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The show featured the rare back‑to‑back pairing of "High Time" and "China Doll," a sequence the reviewer finds interesting, though they express uncertainty about the subsequent choice of "Man Smart (Woman Smarter)".
